query:
UPDATE pipeline_freshness_state
        SET attempts = attempts + 1,
            last_push_at = now(),
            next_attempt_at = now()
                + (LEAST($3::bigint, $4::bigint * (1::bigint << LEAST(attempts + 1, 20)))::text
                   || ' seconds')::interval
        WHERE workspace_id = $1 AND script_path = $2 AND next_attempt_at <= now()
